raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "declaring a meta-commitment to actionable behavioral change",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "vague resolutions cannot be carried out",
    "small observable changes are feasible for the speaker",
    "the speaker can reliably distinguish actionable changes from vague ones",
    "prior resolutions were likely vague and ineffective"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; clearly contrasts ineffective versus effective approaches without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker must subsequently identify, track, and execute specific observable changes; changes must be verifiable and sustained",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "statement functions as substitute for actual change, or speaker never defines or implements the promised observable actions"
}
